title: How Iran and Venezuela strikes transform the Trump-Xi trade talks
summary_full: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.
summary_public: The Iran war and the U.S. attack in Venezuela show a Trump administration more willing to eschew diplomacy and take military action.
